name: @andrewwint/baton-tools
description: Eval / bench / fault-catch / conformance dev tooling for Baton — kept OUT of the shipped skill so it is not scanned or installed with it. Resolves the runtime at ../.claude/skills/baton/runtime.

scripts.smoke: npm run build && node smoke.mjs && node hooks-e2e.mjs && node mcp-smoke.mjs && node conformance-smoke.mjs && node fault-catch.mjs --structural
